who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed due dates. We automatically generate vendor payment schedules instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Managing vendor payment schedules manually leads to missed due dates.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Share in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try customizable payment schedule templates and manual entry option for unique invoices on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
